interface.name: avalonia_embedder

description.summary: bind toolkit surfaces to Avalonia hosts

interface.description: Lets a client associate its xdg_toplevel, or the container wl_surface of an already-embedded window, with an Avalonia-side host, identified by an opaque string minted by the Avalonia application and shared out-of-band.

entry.name: role
entry.summary: object does not have the required role

entry.name: already_embedded
entry.summary: object already has an embedding handle

arg.name: ticket
arg.summary: opaque per-connection ticket from the Avalonia side

interface.name: avalonia_embed_result

description.summary: one-shot result of an embed request

interface.description: Created by avalonia_embedder.embed_toplevel / mark_content_surface. Emits exactly one of bound / rejected once the Avalonia side resolves the token/cookie (after the client's wl_display_roundtrip). Purely a result channel: `destroy` only releases it and does NOT unembed — the embedding's lifetime follows the toplevel/surface, not this object.

event.name: bound
event.summary: the host resolved the token/cookie and wired the surface

event.name: rejected
event.summary: the token/cookie was unknown — the client should treat this as an error
